title: A Story That Had Already Begun Before Anyone Realized It
overview: Being required by their school to be in a club, Yui, Iori, Himeko, Taichi, and Aoki are members of Student Cultural Society. One day, Yui and Aoki come in with a problem... they claim to have swapped bodies last night.

title: Some Fascinating Humans
overview: The Student Cultural Society members have a problem and it seems to be escalating. The group doesn’t know what to do until a mysterious figure explains almost everything.

title: Jobber and Low Blow
overview: As the body switching becomes more common place, the Student Cultural Society members become more adventurous with each other’s body.

title: Twin Feelings
overview: Inaban is not well and she has been hiding it from the group. Taichi, after switching with her, has felt her physical pain and is determined to help her.

title: A Confession and Death...
overview: Heartseed has grown bored with the group. So spice things up he takes over Iori body and jumps from a bridge. He offers the group the ability to switch bodies at will, if one cares to take Iori’s place in death.

title: A Story That Continued Before Anyone Realized It
overview: After weeks of peace, the members of the group have started hearing voice and once again their lives have been turned upside down.

title: Falling Apart
overview: Acting out on their desires is causing members of the StuCS to lose friends and even turn against each other.

title: And Then There Were None
overview: All the infighting between the club members is beginning the boil over. Good advice comes their way from an unlikely source.

title: Can't Stop, Can't Stop, Can't Stop
overview: The group is learning to be more honest with their desires, except for Inaba. Heartseed decides to pay her a special visit at home.

title: Putting into Words
overview: Heartseed warned Inaba that he would make things interesting. Inaba, Iori, with knives and unleashed desires will leave someone crying.

title: A Story That Began as We Realized It
overview: With Heartseed gone the group enjoyed some time off, but a visitor to Taichi is set to stir up new troubles.

title: Into a Snow City
overview: While Kiriyama deals with a friend from the past and the promise she can’t remember. Aoki must decide who he really loves.

title: As Long as the Five of Us Are Together
overview: Taichi screws up and everyone pays the price. While dealing with the situation, Iori gets a call from her mother and the team sets out to help.
